en_title: The Star-Heart Calls to the Forest-Soul
en_body:
Suddenly You, the light, from afar
I within the ancient forest hold back wild feet
Dreaming Your-light within my dream
Becoming a star-heart remembering Your Name.

Your forest-soul also imprisons pain
When Your heart knows how to weep so softly
The star-heart aches when Your-forest-soul returns
O Forest-Soul, sometimes listen
The star-heart calls Your name, O light
And we together face one direction
watching for each other's steps..!!
